OffenceDetail.Description: ASSAULTED AN OFFICER OF THIS COURT, WHILST IN THE EXECUTION OF HIS DUTY.
RESCUED OR ATTEMPTED TO RESCUE CERTAIN GOODS SEIZED UNDER PROCESS OF THIS COURT
ASSAULTED AN OFFICER OF THIS COURT, WHILST IN THE EXECUTION OF HIS DUTY AND RESCUED OR ATTEMPTED TO RESCUE CERTAIN GOODS SEIZED UNDER PROCESS OF THIS COURT.
